job.title: Software QA Tester
job.description: This is a QA testing job for XML ingestion validation.

job.title: Automation Engineer
job.description: Automation engineer role for testing job feeds.

job.title: QA Dummy Job – Delta Test 2
job.description: This job was added to test delta ingestion in the next sync cycle.

job.title: Senior QA Engineer – Montréal
job.description: Looking for a Senior QA Engineer with experience in automation & API testing. Knowledge of tools like Selenium, Postman, and CI/CD pipelines is required. Salary: $90,000 – $110,000.
